questions.question: Simplify: 2³ × 2⁴
questions.explanation: When multiplying same-base powers, add exponents: 2³ × 2⁴ = 2^(3+4) = 2⁷ = 128.

questions.question: What is (3²)³?
questions.explanation: Power of a power: multiply exponents. (3²)³ = 3^(2×3) = 3⁶ = 729.

questions.question: What is 16^(3/4)?
questions.explanation: 16^(3/4) = (16^(1/4))³ = 2³ = 8. Take the root first (∜16 = 2), then cube the result.

questions.question: Simplify √48.
questions.explanation: √48 = √(16×3) = 4√3. Factor out the largest perfect square (16).
